name: Suspicious Taskkill Activity
description: This prompt detects suspicious activity where more than two processes are terminated quickly using the `taskkill` command. This behavior can be indicative of malicious activity such as ransomware, which may terminate security products or other processes to facilitate its operations.

prompts.prompt: Investigate the security event where the `taskkill.exe` command was used to terminate more than two processes on the host `{host}`. This suspicious activity was detected at `{timestamp}`. Identify the specific processes that were terminated. Analyze the command line arguments (`{command}`) used for each `taskkill` execution. Determine the user (`{user}`) who initiated this activity and review their recent actions. Provide a summary of your findings and assess if this activity is part of a legitimate administrative task or a potential malicious event like a ransomware attack.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The hostname where the suspicious taskkill activity was detected.

parameters.name: command
parameters.description: The command line of the taskkill.exe process.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which the command was executed.
